creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2007-07-15 07:15:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/nvclock     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Added files:
    sysutils/nvclock/files patch-src-backend-back_bsd.c 
  Removed files:
    sysutils/nvclock/files patch-src-gtk::callbacks.c 
                           patch-src::Makefile.in 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.8 b2 which fixes build with gcc 4.x
  - Fix WWW in pkg-descr
  - Remove nop knob USE_GETOPT_LONG
  - Install additional documents
  
  PR:             ports/114565
  Submitted by:   Petar Zhivkov Petrov <sinn at debian.fmi.uni-sofia.bg>
  Approved by:    Samy Bahra <sbahra at gwu.edu> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.12      +17 -4     ports/sysutils/nvclock/Makefile
  1.4       +3 -3      ports/sysutils/nvclock/distinfo

  1.2       +0 -33     ports/sysutils/nvclock/files/patch-src-gtk::callbacks.c (dead)
  1.2       +0 -17     ports/sysutils/nvclock/files/patch-src::Makefile.in (dead)
